texto: Thats' Right, Chlo. I want you so Much you make me shake in my f...... pants. I'm obsessed with you with where you are and what to do and who the f... you're with T want to bury myself inside you so deep I won't ever want to pull out.
explicacao: Citação de Red Garnier sobre temas ligados a amor. “Thats' Right, Chlo. I want you so Much you make me shake in my f...... pants. I'm obsessed with y…” articula amor, alpha-heroes, contemporary-romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como contemporary-romance.
